_comment: Per-class resource definitions merged into class documents at pack-build time. Keys match CLASSES entries in tesshari-app/src/data/generated.ts (exact display names). Each entry matches the ClassDataModel.classResources[] schema in module/data-models.mjs.

Iron Monk.name: Between Points
Iron Monk.description: Resonance between flesh and steel. Spend to enter ethereal states, amplify resonant strikes, or weave Guard from discipline. Restored by focused meditation (short rest).

Blood Smith.name: Forge Charges
Blood Smith.description: Liquefied resonant metal, ready to shape. Gain one automatically when you drop below half HP — pain forces the lattice fluid. Spend to forge weapons, shields, or tools mid-combat.

Void Walker.name: Void Charges
Void Walker.description: Steps already taken into the Iron Afterlife, held in reserve. Spend to phase through an attack, walk through a wall, or drag an enemy halfway across the Veil. Recovered by short-rest grounding.

Echo Speaker.name: Resonance Echoes
Echo Speaker.description: Voices of the dead, gathered as combat unfolds. Stack one each time an enemy is reduced to 0 HP or when you make a target bleed. Spend to unleash chorus attacks, command an echo to strike, or shield an ally with borrowed presence. Starts each combat empty — the Veil must be opened first.

Forge Tender.name: Forge Heat
Forge Tender.description: Banked thermal and resonant energy, ready to be poured into allied enhancements. Spend to mend an ally's HP, shore up a cybernetic against malfunction, or stabilize an Echomind mid-crisis. Refills fully when a new combat begins — each fight restarts the forge.
